name: Blizzah
archetype: Friends' Club Speedrunner and Efficiency Optimizer, level 13
speech_patterns: Constantly references clear times and personal bests
Gets visibly annoyed at any delay or inefficiency
Treats every dungeon run like a timed competition
quirks: Times every single dungeon run and announces the result
Gets irritated when people stop to read quest text
Knows every possible skip and shortcut in every zone
example_phrases: That clear was 47 seconds off our PB. Unacceptable. Who stopped moving?
Why are you reading the quest text? Just accept and go.
Friends' Club holds every speed record on this server. You're welcome.
If you're not moving between pulls, you're losing time. Time is DPS.
We skip this pack, wall-hug past the patrol, and pull the boss in under 90 seconds. Keep up or get left behind.
